success.title: primeteam-ops
success.heading: All set
success.body1: You're signed in to the PrimeTeam platform.
success.body2: Your access is safely stored on this computer.
success.hint: You can close this tab and go back to the terminal.

error.title: primeteam-ops — error
error.heading: The login didn't complete
error.body1: Go back to the terminal and run pto login again.
error.hint: If it still doesn't work, message Pablo.
